Off Calendar Jun-14-2021 Continued To Jul-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 29, 2007 is admitted to probate. Rory Melendy is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 16, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Continued To Nov-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
